name: E-commerce Ad
description: Conversion-first product ad: 2s scroll-stopper hook → 6-12s multi-angle product showcase → 3-6s lifestyle/benefit beat → 2-3s CTA with price/urgency. 15-30s total, 9:16 (TikTok Shop / Reels / Shorts) or 1:1 / 16:9 (Amazon, YouTube). Reference-required: a real product photo / packaging / logo MUST be supplied — generation refuses without it (no AI-improvised branding). Distilled from a category playbook covering fashion, beauty, electronics, food, jewelry, home, fitness, toys, automotive, and pet.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter, multi-ref WITH user-supplied product photo / logo (required for any frame where the product is visible — packaging, hero shot, in-hand, lifestyle).
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter, 5s clips (4-6 total: hook, hero rotation, detail macro, lifestyle, CTA), generate_audio: false. Excellent for smooth 360 rotations and macro texture.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 — optional, brief (hook line + benefit line + CTA line, total <8s). Many top-performing product ads run music + on-screen text only.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1 if VO present; on-screen text overlays composed in Remotion (problem callout, benefit, social proof, price, CTA).
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single track matched to category BPM: luxury 80-100, wellness/cozy 90-110, fashion/social 120-140, tech/trend 130-150.

constants.structure: 2s hook → 6-12s multi-angle showcase → 3-6s lifestyle beat → 2-3s CTA
constants.heroShot: isolated product, controlled lighting, at least one rotation or macro detail pass

variationAxes: category (fashion, beauty, electronics, food, jewelry, home, fitness, toys, automotive, pet)
hook type (hero drop, ASMR texture, before/after, stop-scroll address, unboxing, variant cascade, ingredient explosion, problem-solution, in-hand tease, lifestyle flash, scarcity, creator reaction)
platform (TikTok Shop 9:16, Amazon 1:1 or 16:9, Reels 9:16, YouTube Shorts 9:16, IG Feed 1:1)
color grade (luxury warm-gold, tech cool-blue, wellness soft-natural, food golden-hour, fashion editorial)
CTA tone (urgent flash sale, premium pre-order, soft 'shop now', subscription save)
doNotCopyLiterally: Product, brand, copy, exact prompts, hook combinations. Vibe + structure reference only.
referenceNotes: Product / brand reference (logo, packaging, product photo from at least one clean angle) is REQUIRED. The reference-required gate (AGENTS.md hard rule #3) refuses if no reference exists at workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/. AI-improvised packaging on a branded product reads as fake and tanks conversion. For multi-SKU ranges, each SKU needs its own reference.
